# Calculator Error Handling Test
# Tests error scenarios and invalid inputs

# Build the calculator server binary
go build -o mcp-calculator-server .

# Test error handling scenarios
exec mcp-calculator-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{"roots":{"listChanged":true},"sampling":{}}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"calculate","arguments":{"operation":"divide","a":10,"b":0}},"id":3}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"calculate","arguments":{"operation":"invalid","a":1,"b":2}},"id":4}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"calculate","arguments":{"operation":"add","a":"invalid","b":2}},"id":5}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"advanced_math","arguments":{"function":"sqrt","x":-1}},"id":6}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"advanced_math","arguments":{"function":"log","x":0}},"id":7}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"advanced_math","arguments":{"function":"asin","x":2}},"id":8}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"statistics","arguments":{"numbers":[]}},"id":9}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"statistics","arguments":{"numbers":["invalid"]}},"id":10}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"convert_units","arguments":{"value":100,"from_unit":"celsius","to_unit":"meters"}},"id":11}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"invalid_tool","arguments":{}},"id":12}
EOF

# Verify division by zero error
stdout '"isError":true'
stdout 'division by zero'

# Verify invalid operation error
stdout 'unsupported operation'

# Verify invalid parameter type error
stdout 'parameter.*must be a number'

# Verify square root of negative number error
stdout 'cannot take square root of negative number'

# Verify log of zero error
stdout 'cannot take.*log.*non-positive number'

# Verify asin out of range error
stdout 'asin input must be between -1 and 1'

# Verify empty array error
stdout 'numbers array cannot be empty'

# Verify incompatible units error
stdout 'incompatible unit types'

# Verify tool not found error
stdout '"error"'
stdout 'method not found'
